properties.description: Locks the Electrolyzer , when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Turns the Electrolyzer on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Electrolyzer is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Electrolyzer is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current amount of power, required by the Electrolyzer, in Watts.
